metadata.description: Manage receipts, create invoices, and gain insights into your spending habits.
metadata.title: Invoice Management System

metadata.description: The main landing page for the Invoice Management System domain service.
metadata.title: Invoice Management System - Home

hero.title: Manage Your
hero.description: Upload your receipts and bills, organize them into invoices, and gain insights into your spending habits. Our AI-powered system extracts data automatically.

workflow.title: How It Works
workflow.description: Three simple steps to digitize and organize your financial documents

step1.title: Upload Scans
step1.description: Drag and drop your receipts, invoices, or bills. We support JPG, PNG, and PDF files up to 10MB each.

step2.title: View & Organize
step2.description: Review your uploaded scans, select the ones you want, and create invoices from them individually or in batches.

step3.title: Manage Invoices
step3.description: View your invoices, analyze spending patterns, and get AI-powered insights into your financial habits.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.description: Everything you need to manage your invoices efficiently

ocr.title: Smart OCR Extraction
ocr.description: Our AI automatically extracts merchant names, dates, amounts, and line items from your scans.

analytics.title: Spending Analytics
analytics.description: Get detailed insights into your spending patterns with charts and reports.

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.description: Process multiple scans at once - create individual invoices or combine them into one.

features.signInPrompt: Sign in to save your invoices permanently and access them from any device.

bento.title: Everything You Need
bento.description: Powerful features designed to make invoice management effortless

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Upload your first scan and experience the magic of AI-powered invoice management.

metadata.description: Upload receipt scans to your account for later processing into invoices.
metadata.title: Invoice Management System - Upload Scans

UploadScans.title: Upload Scans
UploadScans.subtitle: Upload receipt images or PDFs. Create invoices from them later.

header.title: Upload Scans
header.description: Upload receipt images or PDFs. Create invoices from them later.
header.tooltip: Upload your receipts, invoices, or bills here. You can select multiple files and organize them into invoices later from the View Scans page.

tips.title: Tips for Best Results
tips.tip1: Use good lighting when photographing receipts
tips.tip2: Ensure text is clear and readable
tips.tip4: Capture the entire receipt in frame
tips.tip5: PDFs work best for digital receipts

security.title: Secure Storage
security.description: Your scans are encrypted and stored securely. Only you can access them.

nextSteps.title: All uploads complete!
nextSteps.description: Your scans are ready. Head to View Scans to organize them into invoices.

upload.dropzone: Drag and drop your receipt images or PDFs here

empty.title: Drag and drop your files here
empty.dropInactive: Click or drag files to upload
empty.formats: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, PDF (max 10MB each)

compact.dropInactive: Drag files here or click to browse
compact.subtitle: JPG, PNG, PDF up to 10MB

postUpload.title: Upload Complete!
postUpload.subtitle: Do these scans represent a single purchase?

metadata.description: View and manage your uploaded scans. Create invoices from selected scans.
metadata.title: Invoice Management System - View Scans

ViewScans.title: Your Scans
ViewScans.subtitle: Select scans to create invoices from them.

header.title: Your Scans
header.subtitle: Select scans to create invoices from them
header.tooltip: Select scans to create invoices from them. You can create one invoice per scan or combine multiple scans into a single invoice.
header.uploadTooltip: Upload more scans to your account

stats.selectHint: Click on scans to select them for invoice creation

howTo.title: How to Create Invoices
howTo.step1Description: Click on scans to select them
howTo.step2Description: One invoice per scan or combine multiple

selectionStatus.readyPlural: Create multiple invoices or combine into one

emptyState.title: No scans yet
emptyState.description: Start by uploading your receipts and invoices. Here's how it works:
emptyState.step1Description: Take photos of receipts or upload PDFs of digital invoices
emptyState.step2Description: Choose which scans to convert into invoices
emptyState.step3Description: Our AI automatically extracts all the data for you

deleteDialog.title: Delete scan?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and the scan will be permanently removed from storage.
deleteDialog.linkedWarning: This scan is linked to an invoice.
deleteDialog.linkedDescription: Deleting it will remove the scan from storage, but the invoice will retain a copy of the image. This action cannot be undone.

createInvoiceDialog.title: Create Invoice
createInvoiceDialog.description: Transform your scans into structured invoice data with AI-powered extraction.

singleMode.title: One invoice per scan
singleMode.description: Creates {count} separate invoices. Best when each scan is a different receipt.

batchMode.title: Combine into one invoice
batchMode.description: Creates 1 invoice with all {count} scans attached. Best for multi-page receipts.

singleScanInfo.title: What happens next?
singleScanInfo.description: Our AI will analyze your scan and automatically extract merchant details, items, prices, and totals. You can review and edit the results afterward.

creating.title: Creating Your Invoice
creating.step1Description: Sending your scans to our servers

complete.title: {count} Invoice Created!
complete.description: Your invoice is ready for viewing and editing.
complete.descriptionPlural: Your invoices are ready for viewing and editing.
complete.nextStepsDescription: Review your invoice, verify the extracted data, and make any necessary edits. You can also request AI analysis for spending insights.
complete.nextStepsDescriptionPlural: Review your invoices, verify the extracted data, and make any necessary edits. You can also request AI analysis for spending insights.
complete.failureDescription: We couldn't create any invoices. Please review the errors below and try again.
complete.partialDescription: Some scans couldn't be processed. Successfully created invoices are ready for viewing.

createFromAll.title: All scans are ready!
createFromAll.description: Create invoices from all {count} scans at once

groupBanner.title: These {count} scans were uploaded together
groupBanner.subtitle: Create an invoice from these scans?

metadata.description: List all invoices from the invoice management system.

This is your digital receipts inventory.

Here you can find the receipts that you've uploaded so far.

By clicking on a receipt, you will be redirected to that specific receipt's page.

notFound.title: Invoice Not Found
notFound.description: The invoice with the identifier {invoiceIdentifier} was not found.

loading.title: Loading Invoice
loading.description: Loading the invoice with the identifier {invoiceIdentifier}.

invoicesNotFound.title: Something is missing here...
invoicesNotFound.description: It seems that you do not have any invoices associated with your account. Please upload some invoices and come back later.

selection.description: Choose how you want to share this invoice. Your choice affects who can access it.
selection.publicDescription: Generate a link or QR code that anyone can use to view this invoice.
selection.privateDescription: Send an email invitation to a specific person. Only they will have access.
selection.privacyNoticeDescription: Public links can be accessed by anyone who has the URL. Private sharing restricts access to the specific recipient.

copyLink.successMadePublic: Invoice is now public! Link copied to clipboard.

copyQr.successMadePublic: Invoice is now public! QR code copied to clipboard.

revoke.success: Invoice is now private. Existing links will no longer work.

hints.link: Copy this link and share it. Anyone who receives it will be able to view the invoice.
hints.qr: Anyone who scans this QR code will be directed to view the invoice.

alreadyPublic.title: This invoice is currently public
alreadyPublic.description: This invoice is publicly accessible. Anyone with the link can view it, including all invoice details, items, and amounts. You can revoke public access at any time to make it private again.
alreadyPublic.revokeHint: This will make the invoice private. Existing links will stop working.

warning.title: Public access warning
warning.description: By sharing this invoice publicly, anyone with the link will be able to view it. This includes all invoice details, items, and amounts. Only proceed if you intend to make this invoice accessible to the public.

shareInvoiceDialogPrivate.title: Private sharing
shareInvoiceDialogPrivate.description: The invitation will be sent directly to the email address you specify. Only this recipient will receive access to view the invoice.
shareInvoiceDialogPrivate.emailHint: An email invitation will be sent to this address with a private link to view the invoice.
shareInvoiceDialogPrivate.comingSoonTooltip: Email sharing feature is coming soon

deleteInvoiceDialog.title: Delete invoice
deleteInvoiceDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Please review carefully before proceeding.

impact.intro: The following data will be permanently deleted:

confirmation.understoodDescription: This invoice and all its data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
